# MuleSoft RPA Recorder

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (6.6) of RPA Recorder documentation.
> See [RPA Recorder llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rpa-recorder/llms-full.txt) for all the RPA Recorder documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Documents](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rpa-recorder/latest/documents.md)
